reviews.comment:
Me preocupa la poca responsabilidad de playeros y personal de seguridad con la prohibición del uso del celular. Hay carteles con prohibición sin embargo se usa y nadie se hace problemas por los riesgos que esto tiene. El cobro con la App debería hacerce acercando el QR dentro del auto y no permitir que el cliente baje del auto, use el celular mientras cargan combustible y luego se para junto al surtidor para leer el QR y pagar. Evidentemente hasta que pase una desgracia, ni el ACA ni los clientes entenderán razones. Falta de educación y poco respeto por las normas

(Translated by Google)
I'm concerned about the lack of responsibility shown by gas station attendants and security personnel regarding the cell phone use ban. There are signs prohibiting it, yet people still use their phones, and no one seems to care about the risks involved. Payments with the app should be processed by scanning the QR code inside the car, instead of allowing customers to get out of their vehicles, use their phones while refueling, and then stand next to the pump to scan the QR code and pay. Clearly, neither the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) nor the customers will understand until a tragedy occurs. It's a lack of education and little respect for the rules.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNrcmM2YXJnRRAB

reviews.comment:
La atención por parte de los playeros podría mejorar, no siempre están atentos o predispuestos.

El lavadero de autos 🤯: rápido y eficiente! El trato es correcto, sin quejas.
Si eres socio del ACA, casi 50% de descuento en el lavado 👏🏽
Por fin sirve para algo el ACA (cuando no pinchas o averías)!

(Translated by Google)
The service from the attendants could be improved; they aren't always attentive or helpful.

The car wash 🤯: quick and efficient! The service is good, no complaints.

If you're an ACA member, you get almost 50% off the wash 👏🏽
Finally, the ACA is good for something (when you don't get a flat tire or break down)!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/Ci9DQUlRQUNvZENodHljRjlvT25saldrdGtXSFpYZUZsV01YWmhaVkJuY1hsck1WRRAB

reviews.comment:
No tienen nafta super... y no tienen  ningún servicio gratuito... por más q le gastes 100.000 pesos te cobran por revisar la presión de los neumaticos y hoy 9/7/2025 los surtidores primeros no carga motos porque las mangueras tienen mucha presión y son peligrosas para las motos.... jamás había escuchado algo asi

(Translated by Google)
They don't have super gasoline... and they don't have any free service... no matter how much you spend 100,000 pesos, they charge you to check the tire pressure and today 9/7/2025 the first pumps don't charge motorcycles because the hoses have too much pressure and are dangerous for the motorcycles... I've never heard of anything like that.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURpaFpidHdnRRAB
